exchanges.prompt: Design a multi-cloud architecture using AWS S3 for storage, Azure Functions for compute, and GCP BigQuery for analytics with a Kubernetes orchestration layer

response.content:
graph TD
    participant AWS_S3[Amazon S3] as "AWS S3 (Storage)"
    participant Azure_Functions[Azure Functions] as "Azure Functions (Compute)"
    participant GCP_BigQuery[Google BigQuery] as "GCP BigQuery (Analytics)"
    participant Kubernetes[Kubernetes] as "Kubernetes (Orchestration)"
    participant App[Application] as "Application"
    
    AWS_S3 -.--> Kubernetes
    Azure_Functions -.--> Kubernetes
    GCP_BigQuery -.--> Kubernetes
    App -.--> Azure_Functions
    Azure_Functions -->|Compute Results| GCP_BigQuery
    GCP_BigQuery -->|Analytics Results| App
    App -->|Data Ingest| AWS_S3
    AWS_S3 -->|Data Retrieval| Azure_Functions
    Kubernetes -->|Orchestration| Azure_Functions
    Kubernetes -->|Orchestration| GCP_BigQuery
    Kubernetes -->|Orchestration| AWS_S3
